{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410304335AEB751FEEABA05386B"}"},"total":3309},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7425188189731947289","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"建议大家都来看！不会有那种完全架空感，作者感觉真的读过书（。？）人物特别立体，小孩子特别萌萌，啊，未成年就是最叼的，而且宝宝们感觉比我聪明呜呜，就是有点难以想象感情线呢（"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728816262,"group_id":"7409474049039944766","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阿洵天下第一a","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzf6AT98UOlFNXeJNMG8/kHOoc1n9wxGve0J0aTQy2Ir","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bac18ca0079845b2abd8d570a884b68b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878038&x-signature=Nnp1JGvZN%2BdBkF6cQeByRR0PvuA%3D","user_id":"2780043294809315","user_name":"走到哪里才是归途"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2780043294809315","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7409474049039944766","book_info":{"abstract":"新书《糟糕！好感度刷过头了怎么办？！】已签约，稳定更新，请放心食用！
【动态漫搜《太子带娃记》】
双男  1V1   穿书对上重生 大型修罗场 养崽之余顺便谈个恋爱 温馨治愈甜宠风  谢长安X叶景辰  主受
现代社畜叶景辰熬夜看小说猝死，穿成了小说里同名同姓的炮灰太子。
太子有六个精明能干的弟弟，但自身除了皇帝的宠爱之外一无是处，最后被六个弟弟算计，落得一个太子之位被废，身首异处的下场。
穿书之后没系统没外挂没金手指只知道一半剧情的叶景辰面临着两个选择，不争，会死；争，会累死。
穿来才八岁的叶景辰觉得上辈子九九六已经够惨绝人寰了，这辈子他绝对不要做零零七，皇帝不是不能当，但国事未必一定要亲力亲为！
看着面前排排坐的六个比他还小的小萝卜头，从小饱受家庭和职场双PUA的叶景辰表示，已知这六个日后都很能干，为何不能趁着他们现在还懵懂无知，从小就开始PUA他们？
六个皇子正好负责六部，再PUA一个战无不胜的将军，左右丞相也可以从小时候就开始物色，如此他的班底就齐全了，他只要负责躺平就可以了。
想象很美好，奈何现实一不小心就PUA过了头，天天上演大型修罗场","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-pic/c4f7f821c4cf1d1c33fbe2fc5fb0d685","author":"陆少曦","author_id":"","book_id":"7409474049039944766","book_name":"养崽为患：穿书后被崽掰弯了！","book_short_name":"良辰好景长安","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8f0f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":847,"name":"养崽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=847&name=养崽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7409474080727908926","read_count":"40341","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1444995"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"689","tags":"双男主,甜宠,穿书,古代,1v1,养崽,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2157a48680b051742d4443d7d3002a56~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503443&x-signature=VtWSW%2Fyw9UpICyMOyAQgjQfFDS8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4494415132112616","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410304335AEB751FEEABA05386B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":74,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9674,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":39944},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496937513570501400","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书我以为穿越者到异世用现代文明的知识融合古代权衡帝王术，去一步步改变命运的男频小说看的…
直到谢长安开窍…我回主页一看双男主，太隐晦了！
我回头一回忆，小时候的那些我以为的兄弟情深全是暗糖！
我对双男主不抵触但是也不喜欢，某些双男主都是一方以碾压的权力去诱导对方步入陷阱，我虽然会觉得甜但是看久了会觉得下位者是女性，弱化了性别。
这本书让我知道原来双男主也可以是互诉情爱各自成就，真的很好看","text_exts":[{"e":64,"s":61,"text":"双男主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774319443BA05386B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227496937513570501400%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227409474049039944766%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745531835,"group_id":"7409474049039944766","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1VcWsim5tuV1E+s4jZJYKS7XbcCNlkf7vka2SPCKN6A","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3144216545606020","user_name":"犹豫不决的小独角兽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3144216545606020","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7409474049039944766","book_info":{"abstract":"新书《糟糕！好感度刷过头了怎么办？！】已签约，稳定更新，请放心食用！
